user.title: Add ElevenLabs
user.description: Configure the ElevenLabs account used by voice entities.

data_description.api_key: Your ElevenLabs API key used by all configured voices.

reconfigure.title: Update ElevenLabs API key
reconfigure.description: Replace the API key for this ElevenLabs integration.

data_description.api_key: Replace the ElevenLabs API key without recreating your configured voices.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect ElevenLabs
reauth_confirm.description: The stored ElevenLabs API key is no longer valid. Enter a replacement key.

data_description.api_key: Enter a valid ElevenLabs API key to restore the integration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one ElevenLabs integration can be configured.

abort.no_options_available: Use reconfigure for the API key and subentries for voices.

user.title: Add ElevenLabs voice
user.description: Create a TTS voice entity backed by the configured ElevenLabs account.

data_description.profile_name: Entity label shown in Home Assistant for this voice configuration.
data_description.voice_id: Exact ElevenLabs voice ID to use for synthesis requests.
data_description.model: Curated ElevenLabs model selection for this voice.
data_description.streaming_mode: Choose whether this voice defaults to standard conversion or streaming requests.
data_description.stability: Lower values allow more expressive variation; higher values sound more consistent.
data_description.similarity_boost: Higher values try to stay closer to the original source voice.
data_description.style: Increases stylistic exaggeration, which can add expression at the cost of latency.
data_description.speed: Playback speed multiplier passed to ElevenLabs voice settings.
data_description.speaker_boost: Boosts similarity and clarity for some voices, with some extra processing cost.
data_description.seed_enabled: When enabled, reuse the same seed for this voice to make results more repeatable.
data_description.seed: Deterministic seed sent to ElevenLabs when fixed seed is enabled.
data_description.apply_text_normalization: Controls whether ElevenLabs rewrites numbers, dates, and similar text before synthesis.
data_description.apply_language_text_normalization: Extra language-aware normalization. ElevenLabs warns this can add latency and is only supported for some languages.

reconfigure.title: Update ElevenLabs voice
reconfigure.description: Change the settings for this TTS voice entity.

error.already_exists: A voice with this name already exists.
